recipe.title: Lemony courgette linguine
recipe.description: This courgette lemon pasta recipe is a speedy weeknight staple. Ready in just 15 minutes, and using only five ingredients, it's a total crowd-pleaser!

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh mint

steps.descr: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water...
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta in a pan of boiling salted water according to the packet instructions, then drain, reserving a mugful of cooking water.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, slice the courgettes lengthways, then again...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, slice the courgettes lengthways, then again into long matchsticks with good knife skills or using the julienne cutter on a mandolin (use the guard!).

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, slice the courgettes lengthways, then again into long matchsticks with good knife skills or using the julienne cutter on a mandolin (use the guard!).

steps.descr: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat...
steps.instructions: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then add the courgettes.

on_enter.say: Place a large non-stick frying pan on a medium-high heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then add the courgettes.

steps.descr: Cook for 4 minutes, tossing regularly, while you finely...
steps.instructions: Cook for 4 minutes, tossing regularly, while you finely slice the mint leaves, then stir them into the pan.

on_enter.say: Cook for 4 minutes, tossing regularly, while you finely slice the mint leaves, then stir them into the pan.

steps.descr: Toss the drained pasta into the courgette pan with a...
steps.instructions: Toss the drained pasta into the courgette pan with a splash of reserved cooking water.

on_enter.say: Toss the drained pasta into the courgette pan with a splash of reserved cooking water.

steps.descr: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and a little lemon...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and a little lemon zest, squeeze in all the juice, toss well, then taste and season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and a little lemon zest, squeeze in all the juice, toss well, then taste and season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Dish up, finely grate over the remaining Parmesan and...
steps.instructions: Dish up, finely grate over the remaining Parmesan and drizzle with 1 teaspoon of extra virgin olive oil before tucking in.

on_enter.say: Dish up, finely grate over the remaining Parmesan and drizzle with 1 teaspoon of extra virgin olive oil before tucking in.
